auth_notes: Requires registration through the Henry Schein One Developer Portal. Uses OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. Developers must obtain a Developer ID, Application ID, and Application Secret. Each dental practice must then authorize the application specifically.
rate_limits: Varies by developer tier; typically restricted to 10-20 requests per second per application.
gotchas: The developer approval process can be lengthy and requires business verification.
Data access is scoped strictly; some clinical data points require higher-level permissions.
The API follows the Henry Schein One unified platform standards, which may differ from legacy Dentrix on-premise logic.
client_must_provide: Henry Schein One Developer Portal credentials
research_notes: Integration must be built using the n8n HTTP Request node. While n8n supports generic OAuth2 credentials, the Dentrix/Henry Schein One portal requires specific redirect URI configurations. Developers should use the 'Generic OAuth2' credential type in n8n and map the token/auth URLs provided in the Henry Schein One documentation.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Integration must be built using the n8n HTTP Request node. While n8n supports generic OAuth2 credentials, the Dentrix/Henry Schein One portal requires specific redirect URI configurations. Developers should use the 'Generic OAuth2' credential type in n8n and map the token/auth URLs provided in the Henry Schein One documentation.
